---
title: "Bahman Sadeghi"
navbar: false
image: mypic.JPG
about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - text: Email
      icon: envelope
      href: apl.bahman@gmail.com
    - text: GitHub
      icon: github
      href: https://github.com/bahmanapl
    - text: YouTube
      icon: youtube
      href: https://youtube.com/
---
"Meet Bahamn, a software developer with a passion for exploring new cultures , languages and foods. With experience living in the USA, Portugal ,Bahman has a love for travel and immersing himself in different ways of life. In his free time, you can find him delving into  novels, watching captivating TV shows, and expanding his knowledge of deep learning. As a minimalist and follower of Stoic principles, bahman approaches both his personal and professional life with intention and purpose."This bio was written with the help of ChatGPT.
